text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, guess what? During my time off, I went
fishing with Dia!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We caught bucketloads of fish, and everyone
praised us for getting such a big haul!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Next time, I wanna try landing a really huge catch! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Kitasan Black thoroughly enjoyed her
day off and is fully revitalized!
